topic: Starting the year serenely with a funeral pre-planning contract.

manual_inputs.paragraph: Starting the year serenely with a funeral pre-planning contract.
manual_inputs.additional_details:
Explain that a pre-planning contract allows someone to record their wishes in advance: ceremony type, venue, music, flowers, announcements, and budget. The key
  message should be calm and reassuring: planning ahead relieves loved ones from difficult decisions when the time comes and ensures choices are respected.

  Tone:
  Sober, respectful, gentle, reassuring. Avoid anything salesy.

  CTA:
  Invite people to learn more or speak with the team discreetly.

  Useful link:
  https://www.schneiteretfils.ch/prevoyance/

  Image direction:
  A calm, warm, respectful scene suggesting peace of mind: soft natural light, neutral interior, a person reviewing documents with a caring advisor, no cemetery
  imagery, no sadness-heavy visuals.
